title: Pappophorum philippianum

The species is further classified under the genus Pappophorum, which is a group of plants that share similar characteristics. Pappophorum philippianum is a type of perennial grass, and its classification is in line with the classification of other plants in the same family. The exact classification of Pappophorum philippianum is Pappophorum philippianum (Kuntze) L.B.Sm.
uses: Pappophorum philippianum has been traditionally used in folk medicine for various purposes, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
